reforms.description: The Canadian government announced measures aimed at stimulating corporate investment and research and development, although these measures were of a minor nature.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating corporate investment in R&D is expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures were announced and are stated to be implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The measures are described as minor in nature, indicating limited impact.
reforms.source_quote: Other measures, which were mainly aimed at stimulating corporate investment as well as research and development, were of a minor nature.

reforms.description: The Enterprise Development Programme provides innovation assistance in the form of grants up to one-half of product development costs for small firms, while also offering loan guarantees to help vulnerable industries meet increased import competition.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Providing grants and loan guarantees supports small firms in innovation, enhancing their competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme is stated to be providing assistance.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme offers significant support to small firms, indicating a notable but not transformative impact.
reforms.source_quote: The Enterprise Development Programme...provides innovation assistance in the form of grants up to one-half (or three-quarters for small firms) of product development costs.
